title: critoniopsis tequilana
intro: Critoniopsis tequilana, also known as the Tequila Daisy or Mexican daisy, is a flowering plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating gastrointestinal issues such as diarrhea and indigestion. The plant's leaves and flowers contain flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, providing various health benefits including reducing inflammation and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of Critoniopsis tequilana can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various ailments and promote overall well-being.
